escalation.rationale: Trump issued 48-hour ultimatum to Iran threatening power plant destruction while Iran threatens complete Strait of Hormuz closure and regional infrastructure targeting.

ticker_items: Trump gives Iran 48 hours to open Strait of Hormuz or face power plant strikes
Iran threatens complete Strait closure and regional infrastructure attacks
Israel destroys main bridge in southern Lebanon, orders Litani River demolitions
Possible Iranian missile attack on Diego Garcia base disputed
Senator Graham calls for US seizure of Iran's Kharg Island oil facility

eastern_europe.description: Russian oil tanker targeted by drones, left adrift with no crew aboard

middle_east.description: Iranian missile strikes wounded more than 100 people in two southern Israeli towns.
Blasts heard and air raid sirens sounded in Jerusalem after Israeli military warned of incoming missile fire.
Iranian missiles reportedly targeted US-UK airbase in Indian Ocean
Israeli forces struck main bridge and ordered destruction of homes near border
Israeli forces struck main bridge linking southern Lebanon to rest of country
Alleged Iranian missile attack on US-UK airbase disputed by Tehran

today.incident: Iranian missile strikes on southern Israel

claimed_totals.figure: 1,444 in Iran, 18 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 21 in Gulf states
~1,500 dead in Iran, ~18 in Israel, ~13 US soldiers, ~21 in Gulf states
~1,500 Iranian, ~18 Israeli, ~13 US soldiers, ~21 Gulf states

middle_east.text: We will obliterate Iran's power plants if it doesn't fully open the Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Pentagon requesting $200bn signals that war will stretch on a very long time
middle_east.speaker: Unknown analyst
middle_east.title: Military analyst

middle_east.text: Iran has 48 hours to reopen Strait of Hormuz or face military action
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: From now on, based on the information we have about you, even parks, recreational areas, and tourist destinations anywhere in the world will no longer be safe for you
middle_east.speaker: Iranian military official
middle_east.title: Senior military official

middle_east.text: We Did Iwo Jima, We Can Do This! Take Kharg Island
middle_east.speaker: Lindsey Graham
middle_east.title: US Senator

middle_east.text: The operation against Hezbollah has only begun and would be prolonged
middle_east.speaker: Israeli army chief
middle_east.title: IDF Chief of Staff

observers.description: Britain has deployed nuclear-powered submarine HMS Anson to Arabian Sea with Tomahawk missile capability. This represents direct military involvement in potential escalation against Iran.
China is maintaining neutrality in Iran war according to analysts. Beijing appears to be playing long game while US is distracted by Middle East conflict.
Danish election shaped by Trump's Greenland grab has elevated foreign and security policy concerns. Voters experiencing major shifts on Europe, defense and energy policies.
EU leaders reportedly refusing participation in Iran war according to Russian sources. Danish election influenced by Trump's Greenland demands affecting European defense policy.
Saudi East-West pipeline highlighted as crucial alternative to Strait of Hormuz. Iran threatens Saudi energy infrastructure in potential retaliation scenario.

financial.notes: Oil prices surge as Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to commercial traffic affecting global energy supplies.

update_log.text: Trump issues 48-hour ultimatum to Iran threatening power plant destruction if Strait of Hormuz not reopened
Iran threatens complete closure of Strait of Hormuz and attacks on regional infrastructure
Israel destroys main bridge in southern Lebanon and orders demolition of all Litani River crossings
UK condemns alleged Iranian missile attack on Diego Garcia airbase while Tehran denies involvement
Trump postpones strikes on Iranian power plants while maintaining Hormuz ultimatum
WHO issues urgent health warnings over strikes near Iranian and Israeli nuclear sites
Israel orders military to intensify demolitions of bridges and homes in southern Lebanon
Russian tanker reported adrift in Mediterranean after drone attack with environmental risks
IEA chief warns of very severe global energy crisis as Iran war hits supply
Pentagon requesting $200bn for Iran war operations signaling long-term conflict
Iranian missile strikes wound over 100 people in southern Israeli towns
British submarine HMS Anson deployed to Arabian Sea with Tomahawk missiles
